description: Canadian Tamil street gang originating in Toronto, founded in the early 1990s by Sri Lankan Tamil immigrants. Named after the town of Valvettithurai in northern Sri Lanka. Involved in drug trafficking, fraud, weapons trafficking, counterfeiting, and extortion. Engaged in a long-running conflict with the rival AK Aannan gang. Now considered largely inactive.

country_links.evidence_quote: Territory: Greater Toronto Area Mississauga , Hamilton , Waterloo , Ottawa , Montreal , London, United Kingdom
country_links.context: The VVT has territory in London, United Kingdom.
